name: observability-sentry
description:
Sentry error tracking + performance monitoring. FREE TIER: 5k errors + 10k performance events / month. Adds @sentry/nextjs (auto-instruments client + server + edge). Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN + SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN in .env.local for source-map upload.

The Sentry wizard normally runs `npx @sentry/wizard` interactively — we ship the same files it generates. Pattern source: Sentry Next.js docs.
post_install_steps: Get a Sentry DSN at https://sentry.io (free tier).
For source-map upload (production), set SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN + SENTRY_ORG + SENTRY_PROJECT.
Optionally wrap next.config.mjs with `withSentryConfig` from @sentry/nextjs (see Sentry docs).
